description_long: This is a portable record player housed in a rectangular, suitcase-style case with a light blue exterior and a hinged lid that opens upward. The interior features a black turntable platter with a vinyl record placed on top, and a tonearm extending over the record, equipped with a stylus at its end. The control panel includes a few raised knobs and buttons, all situated on the right side of the platter, likely for power, volume, and speed adjustment. The lid's interior is lined with a beige or light tan material, providing a soft contrast to the blue exterior. The case has a latch at the front for secure closure and a handle for easy carrying. The overall design is compact and retro, suitable for use in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or community gatherings.
description: A compact, retro-style portable record player in a blue suitcase case with a hinged lid, black platter, and control knobs. Features a vinyl record, tonearm, and a beige-lined interior.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the blue case, open lid, black platter with a record, and the tonearm positioned over the record.
description_view_1: Front view with the lid fully open, clearly displaying the platter, record, tonearm, and control knobs on the right.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the depth of the case, the open lid, and the platter with the tonearm visible from the side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing only the closed blue exterior of the case, with no internal components visible.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present and centrally located, circular in shape, and black in color. It occupies a significant portion of the device's interior and has a vinyl record placed on top. The platter appears to be made of plastic or lightweight metal, with visible grooves on the record and a smooth, slightly glossy finish. No additional markings or decorative elements are visible on the platter itself.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, extending from the right side of the player toward the center of the platter. It is straight, medium in length, and appears to be made of black plastic or metal with a matte finish. The tonearm is positioned over the record, suggesting it is ready for playback, and features a visible joint near its base for pivoting.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is visible as a small, distinct component at the end of the tonearm, appearing as a tiny protrusion. It is likely made of metal and plastic, and is attached to the tonearm, positioned above the record's grooves.
attribute_control_knobs: There are two control knobs and one button visible on the right side of the platter. The knobs are round, slightly raised, and made of black plastic, while the button is also black and slightly smaller. No visible labels or markings are present on the controls.
attribute_dust_cover: The dust cover is present in the form of the hinged blue lid, which is opaque and made of hard plastic. It is attached at the back with hinges and is shown in the open position, revealing the interior components. The lid can be closed to protect the platter and controls when not in use.
